name: hoc/overlay-page
description: A layout HOC that presents a secondary page or panel as a modal overlay rather than a full route transition. Provides OverlayPage, OverlayPageHeader, OverlayPageContent, and OverlayPageFooter primitives with slide-in animations and backdrop dimming. Useful for detail inspectors, quick-edit forms, or wizards that the user should be able to dismiss and return to the underlying page context.
useCases: Quick-edit side panels for CRM records that overlay the contact list without navigation
Product-detail overlays in e-commerce grids allowing back-button or backdrop dismissal
Settings sub-panels that appear over a dashboard so the user does not lose spatial context
Mobile drawer-style forms triggered from map pins or calendar events for rapid data entry
usage: import { OverlayPage, OverlayPageHeader, OverlayPageContent, OverlayPageFooter } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/overlay-page"
